opportunities.why_this_fits: THE ROBERT WOOD JOHNSON FOUNDATION has a track record of supporting organizations like Patient Safety Movement Foundation. Notably, COMMUNITY CATALYST received $8,317,000 in 2023 for: SERVING AS THE NATIONAL COORDINATING/PROGRAM OFFICE FOR HEALTH ADVOCACY
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (97%). Consider requesting $11,677 - $21,894 based on their $14,596 median grant. With a 52% repeat funding rate, plan for multi-year relationship building.

next_steps.action: Research THE ROBERT WOOD JOHNSON FOUNDATION's recent grants and stated priorities

Identify potential board or staff connections for warm introduction
